Class KillEntitiesTask

java.lang.Object
adris.altoclef.tasksystem.Task
adris.altoclef.tasks.AbstractDoToClosestObjectTask<net.minecraft.world.entity.Entity>
adris.altoclef.tasks.entity.DoToClosestEntityTask
adris.altoclef.tasks.entity.KillEntitiesTask
public class KillEntitiesTask extends DoToClosestEntityTask
Kill all entities of a type
